<!DOCTYPE html>

<body>

<canvas id="lower"> <!-- normal scene--> </canvas>

<script async src="https://ga.jspm.io/npm:es-module-shims@1.5.1/dist/es-module-shims.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
